节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: LightWeightMap stores key-value (KV) pairs. Each key must be unique and have only one value.
A constructor used to create a LightWeightMap object.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200012 - The LightWeightMap's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

error_codes.description: The LightWeightMap's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

节点.功能描述: Gets the element number of the LightWeightMap.
Returns whether this map has all the object in a specified map
注释信息: @param { LightWeightMap<K, V> } map - map map the Map object to compare
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The type of parameters are invalid.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The hasAll method cannot be bound.

parameters.说明: map map the Map object to compare

error_codes.description: The type of parameters are invalid.
The hasAll method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Returns whether a key is contained in this map
注释信息: @param { K } key - key key need to determine whether to include the key
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The hasKey method cannot be bound.

parameters.说明: key key need to determine whether to include the key

error_codes.description: The hasKey method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Returns whether a value is contained in this map
注释信息: @param { V } value - value value need to determine whether to include the value
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The hasValue method cannot be bound.

parameters.说明: value value need to determine whether to include the value

error_codes.description: The hasValue method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Ensures that the capacity of an LightWeightMap container is greater than or equal to a specified value, and that the container has all the original objects after capacity expansion
注释信息: @param { number } minimumCapacity - minimumCapacity minimumCapacity Minimum capacity to be reserved
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The increaseCapacityTo method cannot be bound.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The type of parameters are invalid.

parameters.说明: minimumCapacity minimumCapacity Minimum capacity to be reserved

error_codes.description: The increaseCapacityTo method cannot be bound.
The type of parameters are invalid.

节点.功能描述: Returns a new Iterator object that contains the [key, value] pairs for each element in the Map object in insertion order
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The entries method cannot be bound.

error_codes.description: The entries method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped, or undefined if this map contains no mapping for the key
注释信息: @param { K } key - key key the index in LightWeightMap
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The get method cannot be bound.

parameters.说明: key key the index in LightWeightMap

error_codes.description: The get method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the index of the key equal to a specified key in an LightWeightMap container
注释信息: @param { K } key - key key Looking for goals
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The getIndexOfKey method cannot be bound.

error_codes.description: The getIndexOfKey method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the index of the value equal to a specified value in an LightWeightMap container
注释信息: @param { V } value - value value Looking for goals
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The getIndexOfValue method cannot be bound.

error_codes.description: The getIndexOfValue method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Returns whether the Map object contains elements
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The isEmpty method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the key at the location identified by index in an LightWeightMap container

@returns { K } the key of key-value pairs

节点.功能描述: Adds or updates a(new) key-value pair with a key and value specified for the Map object

@returns { Object } the map object after set

节点.功能描述: Removes all of the mapping from this map The map will be empty after this call returns

节点.功能描述: Sets the value identified by index in an LightWeightMap container to a specified value

@param { V } newValue - newValue value Updated the target mapped value
@returns { boolean } the boolean type(Is there a value corresponding to the subscript)
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The setValueAt method cannot be bound.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200001 - The value of index is out of range.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The type of parameters are invalid.

parameters.说明: index index Target subscript for search
newValue value Updated the target mapped value

节点.功能描述: Executes the given callback function once for each real key in the map. It does not perform functions on deleted keys. callbackFn (required) A function that accepts up to three arguments. The function to be called for each element. thisArg (Optional) The value to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called. If thisArg is omitted, undefined is used as the this value.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The forEach method cannot be bound.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The type of parameters are invalid.

error_codes.description: The forEach method cannot be bound.
The type of parameters are invalid.
